headline: Philip Morris Stock Drops. Nicotine Pouches’ FDA Review Is Delayed, Report Says.
summary: Philip Morris International  was among the biggest decliners in the  index on Wednesday, after a report said the Food and Drug Administration’s fast-track review to clear certain nicotine pouches for sale in the U.S. has been delayed.  The FDA has yet to complete a fast-track review process for certain nicotine pouches, including some Philip Morris products, Reuters reported Wednesday, citing three sources.  The FDA’s fast-track review was originally expected to be finalized in December 2025.

headline: Altria’s Best Growth Opportunity Is Running Into Bureaucratic Foot Dragging
summary: Cigarette volumes in the U.S. keep sliding, yet nicotine pouches are exploding as the fastest-growing segment in oral tobacco. Marlboro cigarette maker Altria Group (NYSE:MO) has poured resources into its on! nicotine pouch brand to offset that decline, but fresh regulatory worries are slowing the very innovation meant to power its future. Is the growth engine ... Altria’s Best Growth Opportunity Is Running Into Bureaucratic Foot Dragging
